name: dev-squad
description: Full-stack dev team agent swarm with 10 specialized agents and zero-to-ship capability. Agents: coordinator (opus), architect (opus), backend (sonnet), frontend (sonnet), reviewer/security-lead (sonnet), qa-engineer (sonnet), auditor (sonnet), devops (sonnet), git-ops (sonnet), writer (sonnet). Phase 5 review is 3-way parallel (static + runtime + automated tooling). Multi-language quality metrics (JS/TS, Go, Python). Supports zero-to-ship project builds, feature development, database tasks, bug fixes, architecture changes, security audits, infrastructure work, and runtime stability/quality auditing.
